channel.title: Gokhan Kurt - Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on code, craft, and building for the web

item.title: Replace useEffect Chains with State Machines
item.description: Why complex UI state often goes wrong with useEffect, and how a simple state machine pattern can make it predictable.

item.title: Building Type-Safe API Clients in TypeScript
item.description: How to leverage TypeScript's type system to build API clients that catch errors at compile time, not in production.
